name: Button
purpose: Triggers a clear user action with the design system's default action hierarchy.
whenToUse: Use for primary or secondary actions that should feel consistent across product surfaces.
Use when the action needs built-in loading, disabled, and icon support.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for navigation rows or inline text links.
Do not create one-off action surfaces when a Button variant already communicates intent.
accessibilityRequirements: Always provide a clear action label.
Preserve disabled and busy states through accessibilityState.
Do not rely on color alone to explain destructive intent.
Keep the hit target comfortably tappable on both mobile and desktop web.
